title: Broken Lead Warner
description: Let's you know if your lead breaks!
body:
This mod will let you know if your lead breaks! When your lead does break, a warning message will be shown and a warning sound will play. You can change how the warning message will be shown via either a hotbar message or a chat message as of now. You can also configure whether the warning message and warning sound should be shown/played at all.

**Requires Fabric API and MidnightLib.**  
Mod Menu is required if you want to change the config.

**Huge thanks** to Enriath for making the mod work in multiplayer. You can find her GitHub [here!](https://github.com/Enriath)
